# 🧬 CGT 每日情报 (Daily Brief)
> **日期**: 2026-05-21 | **更新时间**: 07:44 (北京时间)
> **监控范围**: Global (In vivo/FDA) & China (NMPA/Biotech)

---

## 🌍 全球前沿 (FDA / In vivo / MNCs)
- `[02:00]` **Vyriad 推出 G-Link：一个模块化平台，推进 T 细胞靶向慢病毒载体在体内和离体应用的传递**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Vyriad Launches G-Link: A Modular Platform Advancing T-Cell Targeted Lentiviral Vector Delivery for In Vivo and Ex Vivo Applications* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[21:05]` **CytoAgents 扩大科学顾问委员会，任命 Michael Wechsler 博士和 Johann Gudjonsson 博士指导管道扩张**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *CytoAgents Expands Scientific Advisory Board Appointing Dr. Michael Wechsler and Dr. Johann Gudjonsson to Guide Pipeline Expansion* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[21:00]` **Acuitas Therapeutics 在 2026 年 ASGCT 年会上重点介绍体内 CAR T 细胞工程和电离脂质质量属性**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Acuitas Therapeutics Highlights In Vivo CAR T Cell Engineering and Ionizable Lipid Quality Attributes at the 2026 ASGCT Annual Meeting* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[21:00]` **🏛️监管 | 启函生物宣布 FDA 批准 QT-019C 的 IND，这是一种通用双靶点 CAR-T 候选药物，标志着开发潜在的低淋巴细胞清除、现成的 CAR-T 疗法治疗自身免疫性疾病的一个重要里程碑**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Qihan Biotech Announces FDA Clearance of IND for QT-019C, a universal dual-target CAR-T candidate, marking a significant milestone in the development of a potentially low-lymphodepletion, off-the-shelf CAR-T therapy for autoimmune diseases* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[20:02]` **HAYA Therapeutics 宣布在 HTX-001 的 1 期临床试验中给予第一批给药，HTX-001 是一种针对心脏纤维化的研究性精确细胞重编程疗法**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *HAYA Therapeutics Announces First Cohort Dosed in Phase 1 Clinical Trial of HTX-001, an Investigational Precision Cellular Reprogramming Therapy for Cardiac Fibrosis* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[20:00]` **Continuity Biosciences 宣布针对胰腺癌的精准给药平台进行首次人体临床试验**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Continuity Biosciences Announces First-in-Human Clinical Trial of Precision Drug Delivery Platform for Pancreatic Cancer* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>

---

## 🇨🇳 中国动态 (NMPA / Domestic Players)
- `[21:00]` **🏛️监管 | 启函生物宣布 FDA 批准 QT-019C 的 IND，这是一种通用双靶点 CAR-T 候选药物，标志着开发潜在的低淋巴细胞清除、现成的 CAR-T 疗法治疗自身免疫性疾病的一个重要里程碑**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Qihan Biotech Announces FDA Clearance of IND for QT-019C, a universal dual-target CAR-T candidate, marking a significant milestone in the development of a potentially low-lymphodepletion, off-the-shelf CAR-T therapy for autoimmune diseases* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
